shipping_services.name: Economy International Saver
shipping_services.description: Cost-effective international shipping for non-urgent parcels and documents with consolidated linehaul.

shipping_services.name: Standard Global
shipping_services.description: Balanced option for most international routes with reliable delivery in under a week.

shipping_services.name: Express Worldwide
shipping_services.description: Fast time-definite delivery by air with door-to-door tracking.

shipping_services.name: Priority Express 9:00
shipping_services.description: Premium next-day or two-day delivery with morning commitment in major cities.

shipping_services.name: Economy Cross-Border Documents
shipping_services.description: Low-cost cross-border service tailored for document shipments with simplified customs.

shipping_services.name: Standard North America Ground
shipping_services.description: Ground service for shipments within and between the US and Canada at an affordable rate.

shipping_services.name: Economy Europe Road
shipping_services.description: Road-based service for intra-European parcel movements with predictable delivery times.

shipping_services.name: Express Duties Paid
shipping_services.description: Time-definite express service with prepaid duties and taxes (Delivered Duty Paid).

shipping_services.name: Green Ocean Economy
shipping_services.description: Low-carbon ocean freight solution for non-urgent heavy parcels and freight.

shipping_services.name: Green Express Air
shipping_services.description: Express air service using optimized routings and sustainable aviation fuel options.

shipping_services.name: Priority Overnight
shipping_services.description: Next-business-day delivery by noon to major business centers worldwide.

shipping_services.name: Standard International Economy
shipping_services.description: Budget-friendly international option with delivery typically within 4–8 business days.
